name: windy-access
description: Give your OpenClaw an email address, a chat identity, and free LLM access via Windy Mind — all in one command.

install.description: Pair this OpenClaw with the Windy ecosystem (interactive).

uninstall.description: Remove Windy credentials from this OpenClaw.
